title: monardella douglasii
intro: Monardella douglasii, also known as Douglas' yerba buena, is a perennial herb native to the Pacific coastal regions of North America. As a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae), this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Monardella douglasii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Monardella douglasii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
